headline: Retrieval and serving infrastructure techniques led the window as agent deployment news clustered around production codebases.
body: Infrastructure techniques dominated the rotation, with semantic chunking and HNSW leading on momentum and also surfacing as breakouts alongside local inference, KV cache, kernel fusion, and vulnerability detection. On the agent side, Spotify detailed running Claude agents across more than 20 million lines of code, Cursor shipped an iOS app driven by always-on cloud agents, and Google Cloud demonstrated a multi-agent system built on ADK, MCP, and Gemini 3 Flash. Business and pricing dynamics drew attention through coverage of OpenAI's GPT-5.6 release, Anthropic's Mythos, and frontier-lab cost and billing pressures.

cited_items.title: Mythos is Back, OpenAI Releases GPT 5.6, Apple’s Price Increases
How Spotify runs agents across 20M+ lines of code, with Niklas Gustavsson
Build a multi-agent system using ADK & MCP
